# Baker 1031 Investments

> Founder-led real-estate securities firm helping accredited investors defer capital-gains tax through 1031 exchanges into institutional Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) properties, 721 UPREIT exchanges, Opportunity Zone funds, and mineral royalties. All educational content below is written by Gerald F. "Jerry" Baker, III and reviewed for compliance.

Securities are offered through Aurora Securities, Inc. (member FINRA/SIPC — BrokerCheck CRD #46147). This is educational information, not an offer, recommendation, or tax/legal advice; consult your own CPA and attorney.

Contact: Baker 1031 Investments, 650 California Street, San Francisco, CA 94108 · +1 (415) 579-1660 · invest@baker1031.com

## Key pages

- [Home](https://baker1031.com/): firm overview and strategies
- [Learn (research library)](https://baker1031.com/learn): 525 in-depth articles and guides
- [Glossary](https://baker1031.com/glossary): 50 plain-English 1031/DST/REIT/OZ terms
- [Calculators](https://baker1031.com/calculators): 10 free interactive tax/yield tools
- [Markets by state](https://baker1031.com/markets): 63 state and metro 1031/DST tax guides
- [Who we help](https://baker1031.com/audiences): guidance by investor situation
- [Current offerings](https://baker1031.com/current-offerings): DST and 1031-eligible offerings (accredited investors)
- [Performance](https://baker1031.com/performance): aggregated full-cycle sponsor track record
- [Sponsors](https://baker1031.com/sponsors): DST sponsor directory
- [Property types](https://baker1031.com/property-types): 16 sector guides for 1031/DST investors
- [How we work](https://baker1031.com/process.html): the Baker 1031 process step by step
- [Disclosures](https://baker1031.com/disclosures.html)

## Glossary terms

- [10-Year Hold](https://baker1031.com/glossary/10-year-hold/)
- [1031 Exchange](https://baker1031.com/glossary/1031-exchange/)
- [180-Day Exchange Period](https://baker1031.com/glossary/180-day-exchange-period/)
- [45-Day Identification Period](https://baker1031.com/glossary/45-day-identification-period/)
- [721 Exchange](https://baker1031.com/glossary/721-exchange/)
- [Accredited Investor](https://baker1031.com/glossary/accredited-investor/)
- [Accredited Investor vs. Qualified Purchaser](https://baker1031.com/glossary/accredited-investor-vs-qualified-purchaser/)
- [Adjusted Basis](https://baker1031.com/glossary/adjusted-basis/)
- [Beneficial Interest](https://baker1031.com/glossary/beneficial-interest/)
- [Boot](https://baker1031.com/glossary/boot/)
- [Cap Rate](https://baker1031.com/glossary/cap-rate/)
- [Capital Gains Tax](https://baker1031.com/glossary/capital-gains-tax/)
- [Cost Basis](https://baker1031.com/glossary/cost-basis/)
- [Debt Replacement](https://baker1031.com/glossary/debt-replacement/)
- [Delaware Statutory Trust](https://baker1031.com/glossary/delaware-statutory-trust/)
- [Depreciation Recapture](https://baker1031.com/glossary/depreciation-recapture/)
- [Distribution Yield](https://baker1031.com/glossary/distribution-yield/)
- [Drop and Swap](https://baker1031.com/glossary/drop-and-swap/)
- [DST vs. TIC](https://baker1031.com/glossary/dst-vs-tic/)
- [FFO (Funds From Operations)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/ffo/)
- [Full-Cycle](https://baker1031.com/glossary/full-cycle/)
- [Improvement Exchange](https://baker1031.com/glossary/improvement-exchange/)
- [Like-Kind Property](https://baker1031.com/glossary/like-kind-property/)
- [Master Lease](https://baker1031.com/glossary/master-lease/)
- [Mortgage Boot](https://baker1031.com/glossary/mortgage-boot/)
- [NAV (Net Asset Value)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/nav/)
- [Net Investment Income Tax](https://baker1031.com/glossary/net-investment-income-tax/)
- [OP Units](https://baker1031.com/glossary/op-units/)
- [Opportunity Zone](https://baker1031.com/glossary/opportunity-zone/)
- [Passive Income](https://baker1031.com/glossary/passive-income/)
- [PPM (Private Placement Memorandum)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/ppm/)
- [Qualified Intermediary](https://baker1031.com/glossary/qualified-intermediary/)
- [Qualified Intermediary Bond](https://baker1031.com/glossary/qualified-intermediary-bond/)
- [Qualified Opportunity Fund](https://baker1031.com/glossary/qualified-opportunity-fund/)
- [Qualified Opportunity Zone Business](https://baker1031.com/glossary/qualified-opportunity-zone-business/)
- [Realized Gain vs. Recognized Gain](https://baker1031.com/glossary/realized-gain-vs-recognized-gain/)
- [Regulation D (Reg D)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/regulation-d/)
- [Regulation D Rule 506(b)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/regulation-d-rule-506b/)
- [Regulation D Rule 506(c)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/regulation-d-rule-506c/)
- [REIT](https://baker1031.com/glossary/reit/)
- [Replacement Property](https://baker1031.com/glossary/replacement-property/)
- [Reverse Exchange](https://baker1031.com/glossary/reverse-exchange/)
- [Securitized Real Estate](https://baker1031.com/glossary/securitized-real-estate/)
- [Sponsor](https://baker1031.com/glossary/sponsor/)
- [Springing LLC](https://baker1031.com/glossary/springing-llc/)
- [Step-Up in Basis](https://baker1031.com/glossary/step-up-in-basis/)
- [Tenants in Common (TIC)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/tenants-in-common-tic/)
- [Triple-Net Lease (NNN)](https://baker1031.com/glossary/triple-net-lease-nnn/)
- [Unrecaptured Section 1250 Gain](https://baker1031.com/glossary/unrecaptured-section-1250-gain/)
- [UPREIT](https://baker1031.com/glossary/upreit/)
